articles.title: Tesla Delivery Numbers Miss Analyst Estimates
articles.summary: Tesla reported quarterly vehicle deliveries below the average analyst estimate, citing production ramp challenges at a newer facility.

articles.title: Tesla Cuts Full-Year Guidance
articles.summary: Tesla lowered its full-year delivery guidance, pointing to softer demand in some international markets.

articles.title: Tesla Under Investigation Over Autopilot Safety Claims
articles.summary: Regulators expanded a safety investigation into Tesla's driver-assistance systems following several reported incidents.

articles.title: Tesla Unveils Next-Generation Vehicle Platform
articles.summary: Tesla showed off a new vehicle platform at a company event, with production targeted for next year.

articles.title: Analyst Upgrades Tesla Citing Energy Storage Growth
articles.summary: An analyst raised their price target on Tesla, highlighting faster-than-expected growth in the company's energy storage business.

articles.title: Tesla CEO Comments Spark Volatility in Shares
articles.summary: Tesla shares swung after comments from company leadership about future strategy priorities drew mixed reactions from investors.
